issues.description: DSL is missing the [Blocker] ability entirely. Blocker is a keyword ability that should be represented as a separate effect with trigger:OnBlock or similar mechanism. The current DSL only captures the [On Play] effect.

PlayFromHand action is correct for the [On Play] effect, but the Blocker ability must be modeled separately. Blocker typically triggers when the card becomes the target of an attack (OnAttacked trigger or a custom Blocker trigger), and the action should involve Resting the card.
